data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1948: If some vines drop down, this tree can\nbe climbed.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A197B: If some vines drop down, this tree can\nbe climbed.\pUse the SECRET POWER?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A19DF: Want to make your SECRET BASE here?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1A03: If this clump of grass can be moved,\nit might be possible to go inside.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1A4B: If this clump of grass can be moved,\nit might be possible to go inside.\pUse the SECRET POWER?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1AC6: Want to make your SECRET BASE here?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1AEA: Have you made a SECRET BASE already?\pI went here, there, everywhere before\nchoosing this place.\pSince you're already here, how would\nyou like to battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1BB2: Waaargh! You're too strong!\nAbout me losing... Please keep it secret!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1BF8: What do you think of my SECRET BASE?\nCome visit me again tomorrow.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1C3B: Have you made a SECRET BASE already?\pI went here, there, everywhere before\nchoosing this place.\pFeel free to hang out!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1CB2: There're a lot of places where you can\nmake a SECRET BASE.\pBut I like this spot best.\nDon't you think it's nice?\pOh, would you like to have a battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1D74: Hmmm... It's our loss...\nBut don't tell anyone!\lIt's a confidential secret!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1DC0: If you're in this area again, I hope\nyou'll visit me.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1DF6: There're a lot of places where you can\nmake a SECRET BASE.\pBut I like this spot best.\nDon't you think it's nice?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1E67:
This is a popular spot.
It's always taken.\pOh! Were you thinking about taking this
spot, too?\pI'll tell you what, you can have this
spot if you can beat me.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1F04: Okay!\nI'm going to defend my SECRET BASE!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1F2E: Hunh? Is that right?\nYou're not interested in this spot?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1F88: Okay, when I move one day, this place\nwill be yours!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1FBD: This is a popular spot.\nIt's always taken.\pI waited a long time for it to open.\nI finally got to use it!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2026: Welcome to my POKéMON LAB.\pI carry out research on battling in\nsecrecy.\pWould you like to see how strong I am?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2095: I'm going to go all out!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A20C9: Hmm... I've still got lots to learn.\nI have to study some more.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2109: Thanks for battling with me.\nPlease come back again tomorrow.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2147: Welcome to my POKéMON LAB.\pI carry out research on battling in\nsecrecy.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A218F: A big mansion is nice, but I like this\nsort of place more.\pI like it because all kinds of people\ncome visit me.\pSo, how would you like a battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2230: When you're ready, give me a shout!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A2254: Aww! Done in!\nBut it's still fun to battle!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2280: Well, anyway, I should go buy some\ndecorations and furniture.\pI want my SECRET BASE to be a place\nother people can enjoy.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A22FA: A big mansion is nice, but I like this\nsort of place more.\pI like it because all kinds of people\ncome visit me.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A236A:
I simply adore shopping for decorations
and furniture.\pI also love raising POKéMON just
as much.\pIf you would be so kind, will you battle
with my POKéMON?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2446: That was all in good fun!\nI should go enjoy shopping now.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2480: I simply adore shopping for decorations\nand furniture.\pI also love raising POKéMON just\nas much.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A24E1: Some people make their SECRET BASES in\nhard-to-find places.\lDo they want to just lie low?\pBut since you found me, how about we\nhave a battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A258A: Oh... Are you maybe tired from searching\nfor this place?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A25D2: Where's your SECRET BASE?\nI should go visit you there.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2609: Some people make their SECRET BASES in\nhard-to-find places.\lDo they want to just lie low?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2663: People have told me that you can get\ndecorations in several ways.\pWe should have a race to see who can\nget nicer decorations and furniture!\pIn the meantime, want to battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2710: This is my SECRET BASE.\nI can't lose!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A276A: I won't lose at collecting decorations.\nCome visit again!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A27A4: People have told me that you can get\ndecorations in several ways.\pWe should have a race to see who can\nget nicer decorations and furniture!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2830:
I found a spot I liked, and I did it up
with my favorite decorations.\pI raise my favorite POKéMON and grow
stronger with it.\pThat's what I do.
Want to battle with me?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A28D7: Show me what you're made of!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A28F4: I guess there are times when you're not\ninto it.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A2925: I know exactly what you're made of now.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A294D: We can both become stronger.\nLet's keep at it!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A297C: I found a spot I liked, and I did it up\nwith my favorite decorations.\pI raise my favorite POKéMON and grow\nstronger with it.\pEvery day is a great day.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2A13: You can learn a lot about the taste\nand sense of people by the kinds of\ldecorations they have, and how they\ldisplay them.\pWhat do you think of my taste?\nAre you speechless?\pWant to see my taste in battling?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2AFB: I'll be happy to demonstrate my style\nanytime.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A2B2A: You're supremely talented!\nYour power seems to be limitless...
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2B69: What did you think of my style?\nI'll keep on polishing it!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2BA4: You can learn a lot about the taste\nand sense of people by the kinds of\ldecorations they have, and how they\ldisplay them.\pWhat do you think of my taste?\nAre you speechless?
